chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-6725 of 2020 Mr. Sarfaraz Ali Pario Versus The Federation of Pakistan & others DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Priority 1. For orders on CMA No.24099/2021. 2. For hearing of CMA No.28672/2020 (Stay). 3. For hearing of Main Case. 08.11.2021 None present for the petitioner. Mr. Kafeel Ahmed Abbasi, DAG. Mr. Hussain Bohra, Assistant Attorney General..-.-.-.-.-. This Petition was filed by impugning the Public Notice dated 21.12.2020 for auctioning the vehicle mentioned at serial No.21 of the said Notice, during the pendency of the Appeal before the Customs Petitioner Tribunal, Karachi/respondent No.3. Learned DAG states that it may be just and proper to dispose of this petition with directions for expeditious conclusion of the Appeal, while restraining the respondents from auctioning the vehicle as aforementioned in the interim period. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of by directing the Customs Petitioner Tribunal, Karachi/respondent No.3, to decide the pending Appeal preferably within 60 days from passing of this order. However, the respondents shall not auction the vehicle mentioned at serial No.21 of Public Notice dated 21.12.2020, till the conclusion of the Appeal. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms alongwith listed application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
